mapper.insert: insert into `notification` (user_id, actor_id, type, target_type, target_id, content, time, is_read) values (#{userId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{time}, #{isRead})
insert into `notification` (user_id, actor_id, type, target_type, target_id, content, time, is_read) values (#{userId}, #{actorId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{time}, false)
